mnemonics.title: Half Adder Outputs
mnemonics.content: XOR for Sum, AND for Carry: S = A XOR B, C = A AND B. Remember: XOR gives the 'different' bit (sum), AND gives the 'both' bit (carry).

mnemonics.title: Full Adder Carry Formula
mnemonics.content: The carry output is the MAJORITY function: Cout = AB + ACin + BCin. If at least 2 out of 3 inputs are 1, carry is 1. Think: 'Any two make a carry true.'

mnemonics.title: VHDL Structure: E-A
mnemonics.content: E-A: Entity first (the outside — ports), then Architecture (the inside — behavior). Entity = what it looks like. Architecture = how it works.
